response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Full Stack Developer with over 12 years in the field, including roles at major companies like Naver and Tencent. His expertise aligns closely with the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). He has a strong background in AI agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest). His contributions to open-source projects and technical talks further validate his technical depth and collaborative mindset.
strengths: Deep experience with full-stack development, including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Vitest as primary stack
Proven expertise in AI agent infrastructure and cloud platforms (AWS), aligning with emerging tech requirements
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership, demonstrated by founding roles and workshops
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Nest.js, a primary required technology, though Node.js expertise suggests adaptability
No direct mention of PostgreSQL or MySQL in recent roles, though MongoDB experience is present
Primary stack does not explicitly list Java/Kotlin in recent roles, though earlier experience exists

key_factors.factor: Full-stack alignment with primary technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
AI agent infrastructure and cloud platform (AWS) experience
Limited recent exposure to Nest.js and relational databases
